mapper.select: SELECT u.email AS freelancer_email, u.name, u.job_category, u.profile_file_id, COALESCE(p.is_portfolio_public, 0) AS is_portfolio_public, COALESCE(p.short_intro, '') AS intro, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM user u LEFT JOIN portfolio_profile p ON p.freelancer_email = u.email WHERE u.email = #{freelancerEmail}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio_profile ( freelancer_email, is_portfolio_public, short_intro, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{freelancerEmail}, #{isPortfolioPublic}, #{intro}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio_profile SET is_portfolio_public = #{isPortfolioPublic}, short_intro = #{intro}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE freelancer_email = #{freelancerEmail}
mapper.select: SELECT tech_stack FROM portfolio_profile_tech_stack WHERE freelancer_email = #{freelancerEmail} ORDER BY tech_stack ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO portfolio_profile_tech_stack ( freelancer_email, tech_stack, created_at ) VALUES ( #{freelancerEmail}, #{techStack}, NOW() )
